<Card>
  <Column>
    <Text variant="heading">倒计时</Text>
    <Row>
      <Column>
        <Text variant="heading">00</Text>
        <Text variant="caption">天</Text>
      </Column>
      <Column>
        <Text variant="heading">00</Text>
        <Text variant="caption">时</Text>
      </Column>
      <Column>
        <Text variant="heading">00</Text>
        <Text variant="caption">分</Text>
      </Column>
      <Column>
        <Text variant="heading">00</Text>
        <Text variant="caption">秒</Text>
      </Column>
    </Row>
    <Row>
      <Button variant="primary" onTap="startTimer">开始</Button>
      <Button variant="ghost" onTap="resetTimer">重置</Button>
    </Row>
  </Column>
</Card>
